title: nephrodium loherianum
intro: Nephrodium loherianum, also known as the Loher's nephrodium, is a type of extinct fern plant that belonged to the family Matoniaeae. Nephrodium loherianum has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include relief from bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In terms of herbal preparations, Nephrodium loherianum can be found in some modern herbal remedies, often used in combination with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
